reasoning: The initial state shows d1=10, d2=20, d3=30, and total_distance=60. The sum of d1, d2, and d3 is 10+20+30=60, which equals total_distance. This suggests the equation is total_distance = d1 + d2 + d3. To verify this, I will change one variable (increase d1) and check if total_distance increases by the same amount, confirming the linear additive relationship.

The initial state showed d1=10, d2=20, d3=30, total_distance=60 (sum=60). After increasing d1 by 10 to 20, total_distance became 70 (sum=70). This confirms the linear additive relationship total_distance = d1 + d2 + d3. The current state matches the result of the previous action (d1=20, d2=20, d3=30, total_distance=70). I have sufficient evidence to conclude the equation.
